subject: [RFC PATCH v4 08/27] mm/ksm: skip KSM for managed-memory folios

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: Identified a potential issue where KSM merging could interfere with driver operations in private node folios. Proposed extending zone_device checks to cover these folios as well.

2026-02-22.patch_summary: This patch series aims to improve KSM (Kernel Samepage Merging) functionality by skipping it for managed-memory folios, which are private node folios that should not participate in page sharing by default.
